claim_text: Across the five common natural tabular-shift tasks, logistic regression and XGBoost, and blind-random target budgets 25-500, intercept updates became beneficial earlier on average than sigmoid while isotonic retained substantial log-loss harm risk through the tested grid.
scope: five common tasks; two models; four frozen probability updates; budgets 25-500
effect_or_boundary: Intercept mean benefit -0.000103 to +0.008803 with harm 43.1% to 1.0%; sigmoid -0.025451 to +0.008486 with harm 74.0% to 1.7%; isotonic -0.4218 to -0.01722 with harm 99.7% to 73.2%.
literature_difference: Only the scoped paired natural-shift grid is incremental; the qualitative complexity/sample-size mechanism is prior art.
reason_or_guardrail: Must retain every task, model, budget, acquisition and method qualifier.

claim_text: No single absolute or relative target-label budget met the prespecified material-improvement condition across the five common tasks, two base models and evaluated probability calibrators in this study.
scope: five common tasks; two models; frozen calibrators; budgets 25-500
effect_or_boundary: Budget 100 represented 0.087%-1.970% of common target pools; key directions retained in 169/170 LOTO and 136/136 LOFO checks.
literature_difference: The general no-one-size-fits-all idea is prior art; the frozen grid and deletion stability are the retained increment.
reason_or_guardrail: Must say in this study or on the tested grid and keep College separate.

claim_text: Among joint-success pairs in 50 primary task-model-budget cells, the Mondrian-minus-Standard median worst-class-coverage difference was positive while finite-threshold availability and prediction-set expansion varied strongly with label-blind random target budgets 25-500.
scope: five primary tasks; two models; Standard versus Mondrian; budgets 25-500
effect_or_boundary: Joint-success conditional worst-class-coverage difference +0.1285 to +0.3541; set-size difference +0.3280 to +0.1975; available-attempt finite-threshold rate 0.3007 to 1.0000.
literature_difference: The trade-off is prior art; only the paired natural-tabular total-budget response is retained.
allowed_location: secondary abstract sentence; main text; supplement
reason_or_guardrail: State that metric differences condition on joint success, the primary summary retains infinite thresholds, and feasibility/set cost are reported separately; no superiority wording.

claim_text: Jeffreys smoothing increased low-budget intercept availability but did not show a clear performance advantage over the unsmoothed intercept update.
scope: five common tasks; two models; budgets 25-500
effect_or_boundary: Operational availability boundary, not a new method contribution.
literature_difference: Supports failure-handling transparency rather than novelty.
reason_or_guardrail: Do not promote smoothing as a general performance improvement.

claim_text: College is a separate small-domain stress case because its target pool supports only the lower budgets and budget 100 consumes about 96% of its adaptation pool.
effect_or_boundary: Cannot be pooled with the common-five 250/500 curves.
literature_difference: A scope stress test rather than cross-task confirmation.
allowed_location: main text scope or discussion; supplement
reason_or_guardrail: Never average College into the full common-five budget curve.

claim_text: The frozen audit reports class-support, method-eligibility and finite-Mondrian-threshold rates to define when comparisons were operationally available.
scope: all six tasks; design-level model strata; budgets 25-500
effect_or_boundary: Task-equal support-rate gap 0.002433; predicted/empirical finite-threshold means 0.779157/0.779643.
literature_difference: Finite-threshold mathematics is prior art; the operational ledger is the retained role.
reason_or_guardrail: Model strata are design duplicates and not independent replications.

claim_text: In the frozen natural-tabular comparisons, small AUROC change did not rule out deterioration in both Brier score and log loss.
scope: primary source-to-target pairs; five common tasks at threshold 0.01; two models
effect_or_boundary: 17/17 pairs below absolute AUROC change 0.01 and 32/32 below 0.02 worsened in both proper scores.
literature_difference: This is a cross-task quantification of a known evaluation distinction.
reason_or_guardrail: Strong correlations remain; do not claim independence or causality.

claim_text: Simulation partially supports the complexity and conformal mechanisms but does not reproduce the persistent high-budget real-task isotonic harm pattern.
effect_or_boundary: Mechanism context with explicit real-simulation disagreement.
literature_difference: No external validation and no independent task support.
reason_or_guardrail: Must report the mismatch; cannot be an abstract contribution.

claim_text: Known-composition class-support probabilities tracked empirical support rates at the corrected rate level, while algorithm eligibility added no loss beyond method-specific class support.
effect_or_boundary: Algorithm-minus-class-support min and max both 0.0.
literature_difference: Technical validation only.
reason_or_guardrail: Do not use run-level binary-event MAE/RMSE as probability-versus-rate calibration error.

claim_text: Detailed leave-one-task-out and leave-one-family-out direction tables document deletion stability of the frozen H2/H3 conclusions.
scope: five common tasks; four source families; two models
effect_or_boundary: 169/170 and 136/136 aggregate key directions retained.
literature_difference: Robustness support, not extra independent discoveries.
reason_or_guardrail: Deletion checks do not establish population-level universality.

claim_text: At low budgets, some positive joint-success Mondrian-minus-Standard coverage differences coincide with infinite thresholds and doubleton sets, especially in the rare-positive task.
scope: five primary tasks; two models; budgets 25-100 emphasized
effect_or_boundary: Available-attempt finite-threshold rate 0.3007 at 25 and 0.6820 at 50; joint-success conditional set-size differences exceed 0.32 at both budgets.
literature_difference: Makes the known finite-sample trade-off auditable under this protocol.
reason_or_guardrail: Do not interpret an infinite/full set as informative class-conditional success; non-estimable attempts receive no zero effect.

claim_text: There is a uniform target-label budget that works across tasks, models and methods.
effect_or_boundary: Contradicted by the frozen grid.
literature_difference: Broad principle is not supported.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Isotonic is universally ineffective.
effect_or_boundary: Only persistently harmful in the frozen natural-shift budget grid.
literature_difference: Prior work and the frozen simulation show contexts where isotonic improves.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Intercept-only is universally optimal.
effect_or_boundary: It has substantial harm at budget 25 and is not best in every cell.
literature_difference: Simple-update precedents do not establish universal optimality.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Mondrian is overall superior to Standard.
effect_or_boundary: Worst-class gains carry finite-threshold and set-size costs; marginal metrics do not uniformly improve.
literature_difference: Formal prior work also treats coverage-efficiency competition.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: AUROC has no value.
effect_or_boundary: The evidence only shows AUROC cannot replace probability-reliability metrics.
literature_difference: Discrimination remains a distinct useful evaluation dimension.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: H1 is new theory.
effect_or_boundary: Hypergeometric class support and finite conformal quantiles are prior art.
literature_difference: Only protocol-specific validation and occurrence rates remain.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Simulation validates all real-data results.
effect_or_boundary: Simulation is a mechanism probe and disagrees on high-budget isotonic behavior.
literature_difference: It is neither external validation nor task replication.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Results apply to all tabular models.
effect_or_boundary: Only logistic regression and XGBoost were tested.
literature_difference: No basis for other tree ensembles, neural tabular models or multiclass systems.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: H6 was tested.
effect_or_boundary: H6 is explicitly outside final scope.
literature_difference: No H6 experiment or adjudication exists.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: Six tasks establish a universal law.
effect_or_boundary: Tasks are a bounded public natural-shift sample with five source families.
literature_difference: LOTO/LOFO stability bounds this sample only.
reason_or_guardrail: Required prohibition.

claim_text: The individual calibration, label-budget, finite-threshold, Mondrian or AUROC components are first, novel or unprecedented contributions.
effect_or_boundary: Each component has direct formal prior work.
literature_difference: Only the bounded joint empirical audit remains incremental.
reason_or_guardrail: No component-invention language.
